data.name: Hentai Age Island
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a soothing and delightful puzzle adventure where each completed level reveals stunning, seductive images of beautiful girls. Enjoy the peaceful ambiance created by soft background music as you thoughtfully slide and match tiles to uncover the full picture.

Take your time—there are no countdowns or pressure. Savor each puzzle at your own pace, making the experience perfect for both casual players and puzzle enthusiasts alike. This game offers a visually captivating and relaxing journey you’ll keep coming back to.

Features :

Unlock captivating and sensual girl images as you progress.

Relax with tranquil background music that complements your play.

View completed images in full-screen mode after each puzzle.

Face an array of levels with increasing difficulty for ongoing challenge.

Enjoy a pressure-free experience with no time limits—play your way.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 繁體中文*

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
